patthana21.16:1.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nadassanena pahātabbo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.16:2.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā dassanena pahātabbo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nadassanena pahātabbo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā dve …pe… avigate dve.

patthana21.16:3.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadassanena pahātabbo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanadassanena pahātabbaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadassanena pahātabbo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā dve, adhipatiyā dve …pe… avigate dve.

patthana21.16:22.1.pli: Nanakāmāvacaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nakāmāvacaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanakāmāvacaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā kāmāvacaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.16:24.1.pli: Narūpāvacaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā rūpāvacaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Narūpāvacaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā narūpāvacaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.16:26.1.pli: Naarūpāvacaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā arūpāvacaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naarūpāvacaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naarūpāvacaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.16:28.1.pli: Naapariyāpannaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā apariyāpanno kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naapariyāpannaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā pariyāpanno kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.16:30.1.pli: Naniyyānikaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā niyyāniko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naniyyānikaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naaniyyāniko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.16:32.1.pli: Naniyataṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā niyato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naniyataṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā aniyato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.16:34.1.pli: Naanuttaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anuttaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naanuttaraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sauttaro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.16:36.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā araṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.16:37.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā saraṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.16:38.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca araṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca araṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā dve, adhipatiyā dve …pe… avigate dve.

patthana21.17:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto ca nahetu sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.17:2.1.pli: Nahetu nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttamūlaṁ tīṇiyeva. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Vipākaṁ natthi.)

patthana21.17:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.18:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ navipākaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu vipāko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.18:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ navipākadhammadhammaṁ paccayā hetu vipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.18:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.19:1.1.pli: Nahetu naupādinnupādāniyo dhammo hetussa upādinnupādāniyassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nahetu naupādinnupādāniyo dhammo nahetussa upādinnupādāniyassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nahetu naupādinnupādāniyo dhammo hetussa upādinnupādāniyassa ca nahetussa upādinnupādāniyassa ca dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo.

patthana21.19:2.1.pli: Nanahetu naupādinnupādāniyo dhammo nahetussa upādinnupādāniyassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana21.19:3.1.pli: Nahetu naupādinnupādāniyo ca nanahetu naupādinnupādāniyo ca dhammā hetussa upādinnupādāniyassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Nava pañhā.) Ārammaṇe anantare samanantare uppanissaye nava, purejāte tīṇi, kamme tīṇi, āhāre ekaṁ, atthiyā tīṇi, natthiyā vigate nava, avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.19:4.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naanupādinnupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu anupādinnupādāniyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.19:5.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naanupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu anupādinnaanupādāniyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.2:1.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sahetuko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.2:2.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sahetuko akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.2:3.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ahetuko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naahetukaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ahetuko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasahetukaṁ naabyākatañca naahetukaṁ naabyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca ahetuko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.2:4.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.2:5.1.pli: Nahetusampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā …pe… hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.2:6.1.pli: Nahetu ceva naahetuko ca nakusalo dhammo hetussa ceva sahetukassa ca kusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nahetu ceva naahetuko ca nakusalo dhammo sahetukassa ceva na ca hetussa kusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nahetu ceva naahetuko ca nakusalo dhammo hetussa ceva sahetukassa kusalassa ca sahetukassa ceva na ca hetussa kusalassa ca dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana21.2:7.1.pli: Naahetuko ceva nana ca hetu nakusalo dhammo hetussa ceva sahetukassa ca kusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana21.2:8.1.pli: Nahetu ceva naahetuko nakusalo ca naahetuko ceva nanahetu nakusalo ca dhammā hetussa ceva sahetukassa ca kusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Sabbattha nava pañhā.)

patthana21.2:10.1.pli: Nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naakusalo dhammo hetussa ceva sahetukassa ca akusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Nava pañhā.) Ārammaṇe adhipatiyā upanissaye nava.

patthana21.2:11.1.pli: Nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naabyākato dhammo hetussa ceva sahetukassa ca abyākatassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Nava pañhā.) Ārammaṇe adhipatiyā anantare samanantare upanissaye nava, kamme tīṇi, natthiyā vigate nava.

patthana21.20:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu saṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.22:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasukhasahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu sukhasahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.22:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naupekkhāsahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu upekkhāsahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.23:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nadassanena pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu dassanena pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.23:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu bhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.23:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nanevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ nanevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Dukamūlaṁ ekaṁ saṅkhittaṁ, sabbattha tīṇi.)

patthana21.23:4.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.24:4.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.26:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nanevasekkhanāsekkhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nevasekkhanāsekkho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ nanevasekkhanāsekkhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nevasekkhanāsekkho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.27:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naappamāṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu appamāṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.29:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ namajjhimaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu majjhimo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ namajjhimaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu majjhimo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.3:1.1.pli: Nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca nakusalo dhammo hetussa ceva hetusampayuttassa ca kusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Nava pañhā kātabbā.) Ārammaṇe adhipatiyā upanissaye nava.

patthana21.3:2.1.pli: Nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca naakusalo dhammo hetussa ceva hetusampayuttassa ca akusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Nava pañhā kātabbā.) Ārammaṇe adhipatiyā upanissaye nava.

patthana21.3:3.1.pli: Nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca naabyākato dhammo hetussa ceva hetusampayuttassa ca abyākatassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Nava pañhā kātabbā.) Ārammaṇe adhipatiyā anantare samanantare upanissaye nava, kamme tīṇi, natthiyā vigate nava.

patthana21.30:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ namicchattaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu micchattaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.30:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasammattaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu sammattaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.30:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu aniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ naaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu aniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.31:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ namaggārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu maggārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.31:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ namaggahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu maggahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.31:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ namaggādhipatiṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu maggādhipati dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.32:1.1.pli: Nahetu nauppanno dhammo hetussa uppannassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.33:1.1.pli: Nahetu napaccuppanno dhammo hetussa paccuppannassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.33:2.1.pli: Ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā nava, anantare samanantare nava, upanissaye nava, natthiyā vigate nava.

patthana21.34:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naatītārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu atītārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.34:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naanāgatārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu anāgatārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.34:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ napaccuppannārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu paccuppannārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.35:1.1.pli: Nahetu naajjhatto dhammo hetussa ajjhattassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā upanissaye nava, purejāte atthiyā avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.35:2.1.pli: Nahetu nabahiddhā dhammo hetussa bahiddhā dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā upanissaye nava, purejāte atthiyā avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.36:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naajjhattārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu ajjhattārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.36:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nabahiddhārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu bahiddhārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.37:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana21.37:2.1.pli: Nanahetuṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.37:3.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.37:5.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.37:6.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.38:1.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ahetuko sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana21.38:2.1.pli: Naahetukaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ahetuko sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Gaṇitakena tīṇi pañhā. Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.38:3.1.pli: (Nasahetukanaanidassanasappaṭighamūlepi tīṇiyeva.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… aññamaññe ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.38:4.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ahetuko anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.38:5.1.pli: (Nahetusampayuttaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ sahetukadukasadisaṁ. Tīṇi pañhā. Hetusahetukaduke ca hetuhetusampayuttaduke ca pañhā no labbhati.)

patthana21.39:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasahetukaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ahetuko sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuyā ekaṁ.

patthana21.39:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naahetukaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ahetuko sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.39:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasahetukaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca … tīṇiyeva. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… aññamaññe ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.39:4.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasahetukaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ahetuko anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.4:1.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nahetu sahetuko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.4:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nasahetukaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nahetu sahetuko akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.4:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naahetukaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ahetuko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.40:1.1.pli: Naappaccayaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sappaccayo sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.40:2.1.pli: Naappaccayaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sappaccayo anidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.40:3.1.pli: (Naappaccayanaanidassanaappaṭighamūlepi ekameva.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.41:1.1.pli: Nasanidassanaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassano sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.41:2.1.pli: Nasanidassanaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassano anidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.41:3.1.pli: Nasanidassanaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassano anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.42:1.1.pli: Nasappaṭighaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sappaṭigho sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana21.42:2.1.pli: Naappaṭighaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sappaṭigho sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana21.42:3.1.pli: Nasappaṭighaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca naappaṭighaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca sappaṭigho sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Sabbattha tīṇi.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.42:4.1.pli: Nasappaṭighaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sappaṭigho anidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.42:5.1.pli: Naappaṭighaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca appaṭigho anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.43:1.1.pli: Narūpiṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca rūpī sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.43:2.1.pli: Narūpiṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca rūpī anidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… aññamaññe ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.43:3.1.pli: Naarūpiṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca rūpī anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.44:1.1.pli: Nalokiyaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca lokiyo sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana21.44:2.1.pli: Nalokuttaraṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca lokiyo sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana21.44:3.1.pli: (Gaṇitakena gaṇetabbā tīṇi pañhā. Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.44:4.1.pli: Nalokiyaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca lokiyo anidassanasappaṭigho …. (Tīṇiyeva pañhā kātabbā. Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… aññamaññe ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.44:5.1.pli: Nalokuttaraṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca lokiyo anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.45:1.1.pli: Nakenaci viññeyyaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kenaci viññeyyo sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakenaci viññeyyaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kenaci naviññeyyo sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakenaci viññeyyaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kenaci viññeyyo sanidassanasappaṭigho ca kenaci naviññeyyo sanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana21.45:2.1.pli: Nakenaci naviññeyyaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca … tīṇiyeva.

patthana21.45:3.1.pli: Nakenaci viññeyyaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca nakenaci naviññeyyaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca … tīṇiyeva. (Sabbattha nava.)

patthana21.45:4.1.pli: Nakenaci viññeyyaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighassa purimasadisaṁ navapañhaṁ kātabbaṁ. Nakenaci viññeyyaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighamūlassa nava pañhāyeva.

patthana21.45:5.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… avigate nava.

patthana21.46:1.1.pli: Naāsavaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca noāsavo sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana21.46:2.1.pli: Nanoāsavaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca noāsavo sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.46:3.1.pli: Noāsavaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca …. (Purimanayena tīṇi pañhā.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… aññamaññe ekaṁ …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.46:4.1.pli: Noāsavaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca noāsavo anidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.
